import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import styles from'./SplitBanner.module.css';/**
 * Banner — 메인 배너 컴포넌트
 *
 * Props:
 *   year       {string}  — "2026"
 *   title      {string}  — "Spring Summer Womenswear Collection"
 *   theme      {string}  — "light" | "dark"
 *   img        {string}  — import한 이미지 경로 (없으면 placeholder 배경색)
 *   bg         {string}  — 이미지 없을 때 배경색
 *   viewLink   {string}  — href
 *   viewStyle  {string}  — "box" | "underline"
 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function SplitBanner(_ref){let{year='2026',title,theme='light',img,bg='#c8c5bc',viewLink='#!',viewStyle='box'}=_ref;const isDark=theme==='dark';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:`${styles.banner} ${isDark?styles.dark:styles.light}`,style:{background:bg},children:[img&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:img,alt:"",className:styles.bgImg}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:styles.overlay,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:styles.year,children:year}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:styles.title,children:title}),viewStyle==='box'?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:viewLink,className:`${styles.viewBtn} ${styles.viewBtnBox} ${isDark?styles.viewBtnDark:''}`,children:"VIEW"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:viewLink,className:`${styles.viewBtn} ${styles.viewBtnLine} ${isDark?styles.viewBtnDark:''}`,children:["VIEW ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:styles.btnUnderline})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:styles.scrollIndicator,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`${styles.scrollText} ${isDark?styles.scrollDark:''}`,children:"SCROLL"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`${styles.scrollLine} ${isDark?styles.scrollLineDark:''}`})]})]});}export default SplitBanner;
